homepage.heroSubline: Reliable electrical solutions for homes and businesses across the Twin Cities. Licensed, insured, and ready to tackle any challenge.
homepage.aboutTitle: Powering Minneapolis with Expertise and Integrity
aboutText: Tim Kunkel Electric L.L.C. started with a simple goal: to provide Minneapolis residents with dependable and honest electrical services. Founded by Tim Kunkel, a master electrician with deep roots in the community, our company has grown from a solo operation to a team of skilled professionals, all committed to upholding the highest standards of workmanship.

We believe in doing things right the first time. That means using quality materials, staying up-to-date with the latest electrical codes, and taking the time to understand our clients' needs. Whether it's a flickering light or a complete home rewiring, we approach every project with the same dedication to excellence.

Minneapolis is our home, and we're invested in its future. We actively support local initiatives and strive to minimize our environmental impact through responsible waste management and energy-efficient solutions. When you choose Tim Kunkel Electric, you're choosing a company that cares about the community.

valueProps.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
valueProps.description: Electrical emergencies don't wait, and neither do we. We're available around the clock to handle urgent situations.

valueProps.title: Upfront Pricing
valueProps.description: No surprises, ever. We provide clear, detailed estimates before any work begins.

valueProps.title: Licensed & Insured
valueProps.description: Your safety and peace of mind are our top priorities. We're fully licensed and insured for all electrical work.

valueProps.title: Experienced Technicians
valueProps.description: Our team consists of highly trained and experienced electricians who get the job done right.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact us today for a free estimate and experience the Tim Kunkel Electric difference.

services.name: Electrical Repair Services
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable electrical repair services for Minneapolis homes and businesses.
services.description:
From flickering lights and faulty outlets to circuit breaker problems and wiring issues, electrical repairs can be a major headache. Tim Kunkel Electric offers comprehensive electrical repair services to address any problem, big or small. We understand the urgency of electrical issues, especially during harsh Minneapolis winters when heating systems rely on a stable power supply. Our experienced technicians will diagnose the problem quickly and provide efficient, lasting solutions.

We handle everything from simple outlet replacements to complex wiring repairs, always adhering to the strictest safety standards. We're familiar with the unique electrical challenges posed by older Minneapolis homes, from outdated wiring to overloaded circuits. Whether you live in a charming Craftsman in Linden Hills or a modern condo downtown, we have the expertise to keep your electrical system running smoothly.

Before starting any repair, we'll provide you with a clear, upfront estimate, so you know exactly what to expect. No hidden fees, no surprises. We use only quality materials and proven techniques to ensure the long-term reliability of our repairs. Don't let electrical problems disrupt your life – call Tim Kunkel Electric for fast, dependable service.
process: Step 1: Contact us to describe your electrical issue.
Step 2: We'll schedule a convenient appointment for diagnosis.
Step 3: Our technician will assess the problem and provide a detailed estimate.
Step 4: Upon your approval, we'll complete the repair efficiently and safely.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to an electrical emergency?
faq.answer: We offer 24/7 emergency service and strive to respond to urgent calls within the hour, depending on your location in Minneapolis.

faq.question: What types of electrical repairs do you handle?
faq.answer: We handle a wide range of repairs, including outlets, switches, wiring, circuit breakers, lighting fixtures, and more. No job is too big or too small.

faq.question: Are your electricians licensed and insured?
faq.answer: Yes, all of our electricians are fully licensed and insured, ensuring your safety and peace of mind.

services.name: Electrical Installation Services
services.shortDescription: Expert electrical installations for new construction, remodels, and upgrades.
services.description:
Whether you're building a new home in Southwest Minneapolis, remodeling your kitchen in Uptown, or upgrading your electrical panel in Northeast, Tim Kunkel Electric provides professional electrical installation services to meet your needs. We understand the importance of a properly installed electrical system for safety, efficiency, and convenience.

Our experienced electricians are skilled in all aspects of electrical installation, from wiring and lighting to outlets and appliances. We work closely with homeowners, contractors, and designers to ensure that your electrical system meets your specific requirements and complies with all local codes. We're familiar with the electrical codes specific to Minneapolis and Hennepin County, ensuring your project is up to standard.

We handle a wide range of installation projects, including new home wiring, kitchen and bathroom remodels, basement finishing, electrical panel upgrades, lighting installations, and more. We use only quality materials and proven techniques to ensure the long-term reliability of our installations. With Minneapolis' aging housing stock, proper grounding and surge protection are essential, and we specialize in these critical safety upgrades.
process: Step 1: Contact us to discuss your electrical installation project.
Step 2: We'll provide a detailed consultation and estimate.
Step 3: Our team will complete the installation according to your specifications.
Step 4: We'll inspect the installation and ensure your satisfaction.
benefits: Customized solutions to meet your needs

faq.question: Do you handle electrical installations for new construction projects?
faq.answer: Yes, we have extensive experience in providing electrical installations for new homes and commercial buildings in Minneapolis.

faq.question: What types of lighting installations do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a wide range of lighting installations, including recessed lighting, pendant lighting, track lighting, landscape lighting, and more.

faq.question: How do I know if I need an electrical panel upgrade?
faq.answer: If your electrical panel is old, damaged, or unable to handle your current electrical load, it may be time for an upgrade. We can assess your panel and recommend the best solution.

services.name: Lighting Design & Installation
services.shortDescription: Enhance your home or business with custom lighting solutions.
services.description:
Proper lighting can transform the ambiance of your home or business, enhance its functionality, and improve its energy efficiency. Tim Kunkel Electric offers comprehensive lighting design and installation services to create the perfect lighting scheme for your needs. We understand the importance of balancing aesthetics with practicality, especially during long Minneapolis winters when natural light is limited.

Our experienced electricians can help you choose the right lighting fixtures, placement, and controls to achieve your desired effect. We offer a wide range of lighting options, including recessed lighting, pendant lighting, track lighting, landscape lighting, and more. We also specialize in energy-efficient LED lighting solutions, which can save you money on your energy bills and reduce your environmental impact.

Whether you're looking to create a cozy atmosphere in your living room, enhance the curb appeal of your home, or improve the visibility in your workplace, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life. We handle everything from simple fixture replacements to complex lighting design projects, always adhering to the highest standards of quality and safety.
process: Step 1: Contact us to discuss your lighting needs and preferences.
Step 2: We'll provide a detailed lighting design consultation.
Step 3: Our team will install your new lighting fixtures efficiently and safely.
Step 4: We'll ensure your complete satisfaction with the finished project.

faq.question: What are the benefits of LED lighting?
faq.answer: LED lighting is more energy-efficient, longer-lasting, and more durable than traditional lighting options. It can also save you money on your energy bills.

faq.question: Do you offer landscape lighting services?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide landscape lighting design and installation services to enhance the beauty and security of your property.

faq.question: Can you help me choose the right lighting fixtures for my home?
faq.answer: Yes, our experienced electricians can provide expert guidance on selecting the best lighting fixtures for your needs and style.

services.name: Electrical Panel Upgrades & Repairs
services.shortDescription: Ensure the safety and reliability of your electrical system with panel services.
services.description:
Your electrical panel is the heart of your electrical system, distributing power throughout your home or business. An outdated or damaged electrical panel can be a safety hazard and may not be able to handle your current electrical load. Tim Kunkel Electric provides comprehensive electrical panel upgrade and repair services to ensure the safety and reliability of your electrical system.

We can assess your electrical panel and recommend the best solution for your needs. Whether you need a simple repair or a complete panel upgrade, our experienced electricians have the expertise to get the job done right. We're familiar with the electrical codes specific to Minneapolis and Hennepin County, ensuring your panel meets all safety standards.

We handle everything from replacing breakers to installing new panels, always using quality materials and proven techniques. We understand the importance of proper grounding and surge protection, especially in Minneapolis where severe thunderstorms are common. Don't wait until you have an electrical emergency – call Tim Kunkel Electric to schedule a panel inspection today.
process: Step 1: Contact us to schedule an electrical panel inspection.
Step 2: We'll assess your panel and recommend the best solution.
Step 3: Our team will complete the upgrade or repair efficiently and safely.
Step 4: We'll inspect the installation and ensure your satisfaction.

faq.question: How do I know if I need an electrical panel upgrade?
faq.answer: If your electrical panel is old, damaged, or frequently tripping breakers, it may be time for an upgrade. We can assess your panel and provide expert advice.

faq.question: What are the benefits of a new electrical panel?
faq.answer: A new electrical panel can improve the safety and reliability of your electrical system, increase your electrical capacity, and protect your home from power surges.

faq.question: How long does it take to upgrade an electrical panel?
faq.answer: The time it takes to upgrade an electrical panel depends on the complexity of the project, but we typically complete most upgrades within a day.

services.name: Wiring & Rewiring Services
services.shortDescription: Safe and reliable wiring solutions for homes and businesses.
services.description:
Outdated or damaged wiring can be a major safety hazard, especially in older Minneapolis homes. Tim Kunkel Electric provides comprehensive wiring and rewiring services to ensure the safety and reliability of your electrical system. We understand the challenges of working with old wiring, from cloth insulation to knob-and-tube systems.

Our experienced electricians can assess your wiring and recommend the best solution for your needs. Whether you need a simple repair or a complete rewiring, we have the expertise to get the job done right. We use only quality materials and proven techniques to ensure the long-term reliability of our wiring installations.

We handle everything from replacing outlets and switches to rewiring entire homes and businesses, always adhering to the strictest safety standards. We're familiar with the electrical codes specific to Minneapolis and Hennepin County, ensuring your wiring is up to code. Don't take chances with your electrical safety – call Tim Kunkel Electric for professional wiring services.
process: Step 1: Contact us to schedule a wiring inspection.
Step 2: We'll assess your wiring and recommend the best solution.
Step 3: Our team will complete the wiring or rewiring efficiently and safely.
Step 4: We'll inspect the installation and ensure your satisfaction.

faq.question: How do I know if my home needs rewiring?
faq.answer: If your home is old, has outdated wiring, or frequently experiences electrical problems, it may be time for rewiring. We can assess your wiring and provide expert advice.

faq.question: What are the benefits of rewiring my home?
faq.answer: Rewiring your home can improve the safety and reliability of your electrical system, increase your electrical capacity, and reduce the risk of electrical fires.

faq.question: How long does it take to rewire a home?
faq.answer: The time it takes to rewire a home depends on the size and complexity of the project, but we typically complete most rewiring projects within a few days.

services.name: 24/7 Emergency Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Reliable emergency electrical services available 24/7 in Minneapolis.
services.description:
Electrical emergencies can happen at any time, day or night. That's why Tim Kunkel Electric offers 24/7 emergency electrical services to Minneapolis residents and businesses. We understand the urgency of electrical problems, especially during harsh Minnesota winters when heating systems are critical. Whether it's a power outage, a downed power line, or a sparking outlet, we're here to help.

Our experienced electricians are available around the clock to respond to your emergency. We'll arrive quickly, assess the situation, and provide the necessary repairs to restore your power and ensure your safety. We're equipped to handle a wide range of electrical emergencies, from simple repairs to complex troubleshooting. We prioritize safety above all else and will take the necessary precautions to protect your property and your family.

Don't hesitate to call us if you have an electrical emergency. We're here to help you 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
process: Step 1: Call our emergency hotline at +16513531072.
Step 2: Describe your electrical emergency to our dispatcher.
Step 3: We'll dispatch an experienced electrician to your location immediately.
Step 4: Our electrician will assess the situation and provide the necessary repairs.

faq.question: What constitutes an electrical emergency?
faq.answer: Examples of electrical emergencies include power outages, downed power lines, sparking outlets, burning smells, and any situation that poses an immediate threat to safety.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to an electrical emergency?
faq.answer: We strive to respond to emergency calls as quickly as possible, typically within the hour, depending on your location in Minneapolis.

faq.question: What should I do while waiting for the electrician to arrive?
faq.answer: If possible, turn off the power to the affected area. Avoid contact with any exposed wires or electrical equipment. Stay away from downed power lines and call 911 if necessary.

serviceAreas.content: Proudly serving Minneapolis and surrounding communities.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Tim Kunkel Electric upgraded our electrical panel in our 1920s craftsman in Southwest Minneapolis. They were professional, efficient, and explained everything clearly. We highly recommend them!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We hired Tim Kunkel Electric to install recessed lighting in our kitchen. The work was done well and the electricians were friendly. There was a slight delay due to a parts shortage, but they communicated clearly throughout the process.

reviews.name: Emily S.
reviews.text: I had a faulty outlet in my home office, and Tim Kunkel Electric came out the same day to fix it. The electrician was knowledgeable and professional, and the price was very reasonable.

reviews.name: Tom B.
reviews.text: Tim Kunkel Electric rewired our entire home in the North Loop. It was a big job, but they completed it on time and within budget. We're very happy with the results!

reviews.name: Lisa R.
reviews.text: We had a power outage in the middle of the night, and Tim Kunkel Electric responded quickly. They were able to diagnose the problem and restore our power within a few hours. We were very grateful for their prompt service.

reviews.name: Michael P.
reviews.text: We used Tim Kunkel Electric for the electrical work on our new construction home. They did a fantastic job, and we were very impressed with their attention to detail. Highly recommend!
